title: Noell Ciro
content:
{{Top|fa|leg}} {{Otheruses|Ciro}} {{Character |type=New Republic |image=[[File:Noell_Ciro.jpg]] |name=Noell Ciro |homeworld=[[Dolomar]]''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' |birth= |death=[[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], [[Kolatill]]{{DarkStryder|adventure=Omens|book=The DarkStryder Campaign}} |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color|Black]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings=[[Keleman Ciro]] |children= |affiliation=*[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] **[[New Republic Starfighter Corps/Legends|New Republic Starfighter Corps]] **''[[FarStar]]'' |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I don't suppose he'll be able to spare us any X-wings.''"
"''I've already asked him. He says that if he can, your brother will definitely be at the top of the list.|Keleman Ciro and Lieutenant Judder Page, discussing Noell Ciro's transfer to the ''FarStar''|{{DarkStryder|adventure=The Saga Begins|book=The DarkStryder Campaign}}}} '''Noell Ciro''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dolomar]]. Along with his brother, [[Keleman Ciro|Keleman]], he joined one of his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld's]] [[Dolomar resistance|resistance groups]] and assisted in the [[Liberation of Dolomar|liberation]] of the planet from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces. Seeing a way to leave his home planet, he joined the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|military]] at the same [[Time/Legends|time]] as his elder sibling. Ciro underwent training as a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and [[Starfighter combat/Legends|fought]] in several campaigns against Imperial forces before being assigned to the [[New Republic task force (Kal'Shebbol)|task force]] to [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|liberate]] the planet [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]]. The [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], Kal'Shebbol was the headquarters of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]], an Imperial [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] who had broken away from the Empire after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. With Kal'Shebbol liberated, Sarne fled from the planet into the depths of the Kathol [[Sector/Legends|sector]]. Ciro was subsequently assigned to the ''[[FarStar]]'' [[DarkStryder Campaign|mission]], which was charged with tracking down the rogue warlord and neutralizing any threat he posed. He was transferred at the behest of his brother, who was commanding the mission, and was part of the [[Starship/Legends|ship's]] [[FarStar starfighter squadron|starfighter complement]]. Shortly after the beginning of the mission, Ciro participated in the [[Battle of Kolatill]], a conflict against [[Moff Sarne's forces|forces]] loyal to Sarne, wherein the young pilot [[Death/Legends|lost his life]]. ==Biography== [[File:Keleman_Ciro.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Noell Ciro's brother, Keleman]] ===Early life=== Noell Ciro was born on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dolomar]], located in the [[Dolomar sector/Legends|Dolomar sector]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} Ciro grew up in one of the planet's underground [[City/Legends|cities]]''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]'' with his elder brother, [[Keleman Ciro|Keleman]], and their family. As a youth, he raced [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] bikes on the local racing tracks. When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] began to tighten its grip on the planet, Ciro and his brother fell in with one of the local [[Dolomar resistance|resistance groups]]. Ciro participated in assaults against Imperial forces, and, shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], he assisted in overthrowing the Imperial [[Governor/Legends|governor]] and [[Liberation of Dolomar|liberating]] his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. With Dolomar free from the Empire, Ciro joined the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|military]] along with his brother as a way to leave his homeworld behind. While Keleman trained as a [[New Republic Special Forces/Legends|commando operative]], Noell opted to train as a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]. ===New Republic service=== Scoring well in initial [[Flight simulator/Legends|simulator]] testing, Ciro was accepted into pilot training at the [[Sluis Van Outer Starfighter Base]]. He sailed through the training program and entered regular service, piloting a [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]]. Ciro [[Starfighter combat/Legends|fought]] in several campaigns against Imperial forces before being assigned to the [[New Republic task force (Kal'Shebbol)|task force]] charged with [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|liberating]] [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]], the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]]. Following the successful liberation of Kal'Shebbol, Ciro was at the top of a list of pilots to be transferred to the ''[[FarStar]]''—a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] heavily modified to act as a starfighter [[Carrier/Legends|carrier]]. The ship had been sent on an extended [[DarkStryder Campaign|mission]] to track down the former Imperial ruler of the Kathol [[Sector/Legends|sector]], [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]], who had broken away from the Empire in the wake of the Battle of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] and declared himself an independent [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]]. Sarne had escaped from the planet into the depths of the Kathol sector with the bulk of his [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]], as well as some potent [[DarkStryder technology|exotic technology]], and needed to be neutralized before he threatened to further destabilize the region. Keleman—who had participated in the Kal'Shebbol operation as a member of the elite [[Katarn Commandos|Page's Commandos]]—had been assigned to command the mission and the [[Starship/Legends|ship]], despite his role as a [[Commando/Legends|commando]], and he had requested that his brother be part of the ''FarStar''{{'s}} [[FarStar starfighter squadron|starfighter complement]]. ===Serving aboard the ''FarStar''=== Aboard the ''FarStar'', Ciro saw it as his responsibility to facilitate a smooth working relationship between his brother and [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Ranna Gorjaye]], the [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the [[Corvette/Legends|corvette's]] starfighter [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]]. Gorjaye was unhappy at having to take orders from commandos, and Ciro knew that any disharmony between the command staff could affect the success of the mission. Shortly after launching from Kal'Shebbol, the ''FarStar'' responded to a [[Distress signal/Legends|distress call]] from the nearby planet [[Kolatill]]. The planet had been [[Bombing of Domaz|attacked]] by [[Moff Sarne's forces|forces]] loyal to Sarne in retaliation for the population's overthrowing of its Imperial governor when they had learned that Kal'Shebbol had fallen to the New Republic. Relief operations were organized, and Ciro, along with Gorjaye, found himself on the planet after escorting [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttles]] from the ''FarStar'' to the surface. [[File:Noell_Ciro_death.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Ciro's death at Kolatill, ramming a TIE bomber]] In [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]], Sarne's [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carrier]] ''[[Kathol Protector]]'', which had perpetrated the earlier attacks on the capital [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Domaz]] on Kolatill, returned for a further assault on the planet. Ciro and Gorjaye scrambled their fighters to intercept two squadrons of [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]] that were bearing down on the planet, and were assisted by Kolatill's own [[Kolatill Defense Force|planetary defense force]]. In [[Realspace/Legends|space]], the escort carrier's starfighter complement engaged the ''FarStar'' and its remaining fighter screen directly. In Kolatill's [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]], [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]] aboard a New Republic starfighter determined that the TIE [[Bomber/Legends|bombers]] were armed with [[Pathogenic bomb|biological weapons]] and that they were intent on striking not only Domaz, but other major population centers across the planet as well. Knowing that even a single successful strike could kill millions of beings, Ciro and the other defending pilots [[Battle of Kolatill|engaged]] the Imperial bombers. Fortunately for the defenders, the pathogenic bomb's payload was so toxic that each of the prime components were stored separately, and only mixed together immediately before deployment. If kept apart, the individual components were harmless, allowing the TIE bombers to be destroyed without spreading the toxin. During the engagement, Ciro's X-wing fighter took a hit that disabled its weapons systems. Detecting a bomber nearing its target site with his instruments, Ciro realized that he was the only fighter in range. Changing course, Ciro intercepted and rammed the bomber, destroying both ships and [[Death/Legends|killing]] himself, but saving millions of lives in the process. With its bomber force destroyed, the ''Kathol Protector'' recalled its fighters and withdrew from the [[Kolatill system/Legends|Kolatill system]]. ==Personality and traits== Noell Ciro was a skilled pilot, able to fly both swoop bikes and starfighters with a degree of competence. He was also trained in the use of a starship's weapons and [[Deflector shield/Legends|shield]] systems, had a working knowledge of [[Astrogation/Legends|astrogation]], and could repair starfighters. Ciro was also knowledgeable about other [[Star system/Legends|planetary systems]]. On Dolomar, Ciro was a wisecracking and cocky young man. After joining the New Republic military, he came to understand the seriousness of his duties and became a more thoughtful and serious individual. As a result of seeing many good friends die, he helped young pilots with an abundance of enthusiasm to become more serious and focused to prevent their being killed. Despite this, he was still an aggressive fighter pilot. Before he died at Kolatill, Ciro was excited to serve under his brother on the ''FarStar'', and he wanted to assist him in smoothing the relationship between the command crew and the starfighter detachment. ==Equipment== While on duty aboard the ''FarStar'', Ciro wore a [[Flight suit/Legends|flight suit]] and carried a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]], [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]], and [[Ration pack/Legends|survival rations]]. He was assigned to fly one of the ''FarStar''{{'s}} [[T-65B X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65B X-wing starfighters]]. ==Behind the scenes== Noell Ciro was created for [[West End Games]]' ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' as a member of the ''FarStar''{{'s}} starfighter contingent. Ciro makes no direct appearances in any narratives but is mentioned in ''[[The Saga Begins]]'', the lead-in story to the campaign. His death is documented in ''[[Omens]]'', the first adventure scenario in the sourcebook. Although much of ''The DarkStryder Campaign'', including its supplements, ''[[The Kathol Outback]]'',''[[The Kathol Outback]]'' ''[[The Kathol Rift]]'',''[[The Kathol Rift]]'' and ''[[Endgame]]'',''[[Endgame]]'' can be altered to suit the individual playing styles of the gamemaster and players, Ciro's death at Kolatill is a required event in the [[The DarkStryder Campaign (series)|campaign]]. The three subsequent supplements make no mention of the character and proceed on the premise that he is dead. ==Appearances== *{{DarkStryder|adventure=The Saga Begins|book=The DarkStryder Campaign|reprint=yes}} {{Mo}} *{{DarkStryder|adventure=Omens|book=The DarkStryder Campaign|reprint=yes}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' *''[[The DarkStryder Campaign, Deluxe]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |fi=Noell Ciro }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Ciro, Noell}} [[Category:FarStar crewmembers and personnel]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:New Republic Starfighter Corps personnel]] [[Category:Resistance fighters]]
